---
title: "Legislators - 91st General Assembly"
format:
  html:
    echo: false
    message: false
    warning: false
    toc: true
    toc-location: right
    toc-depth: 2
---

```{r}
library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(stringr)
library(tidyr)
library(gt)

source(here::here("R/utils.R"))
```

```{r}
# Load data
people <- read_csv(here::here("legiscan/files_ga91_derived/people.csv"), show_col_types = FALSE) |>
  filter(!is.na(first_name), first_name != "")
sponsors <- read_csv(here::here("legiscan/files_ga91_derived/sponsors.csv"), show_col_types = FALSE)
votes <- read_csv(here::here("legiscan/files_ga91_derived/votes.csv"), show_col_types = FALSE)
rollcalls <- read_csv(here::here("legiscan/files_ga91_derived/rollcalls.csv"), show_col_types = FALSE)

# Load processed voting statistics
legislator_stats <- read_rds(here::here("data/legislator_voting_stats_91st_ga.rds"))
```

```{r}
# Identify former legislators via duplicate districts.
# When a legislator resigns or passes away, LegiScan adds their replacement
# to the same district, creating duplicate entries. We determine who is former
# by comparing last vote dates within each duplicate pair.
last_vote_dates <- votes |>
  left_join(rollcalls |> select(roll_call_id, date), by = "roll_call_id") |>
  group_by(people_id) |>
  summarize(last_vote_date = max(date, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

dup_districts <- people |>
  count(role, district) |>
  filter(n > 1)

former_ids <- people |>
  semi_join(dup_districts, by = c("role", "district")) |>
  left_join(last_vote_dates, by = "people_id") |>
  group_by(role, district) |>
  mutate(
    is_former = case_when(
      # Both have votes: the one who voted earlier is former
      all(!is.na(last_vote_date)) ~ last_vote_date == min(last_vote_date),
      # One has votes, one doesn't: the voter left and was replaced
      !is.na(last_vote_date) ~ TRUE,
      # No votes yet: this is the new replacement
      is.na(last_vote_date) ~ FALSE
    )
  ) |>
  ungroup() |>
  filter(is_former) |>
  pull(people_id)

former_info <- people |>
  semi_join(dup_districts, by = c("role", "district")) |>
  mutate(is_former = people_id %in% former_ids) |>
  arrange(role, district, is_former) |>
  group_by(role, district) |>
  summarize(
    former = name[is_former],
    former_party = party[is_former],
    replacement = name[!is_former],
    replacement_party = party[!is_former],
    .groups = "drop"
  ) |>
  mutate(
    chamber = if_else(role == "Sen", "Senate", "House"),
    note = str_glue("{former} ({former_party}) replaced by {replacement} ({replacement_party}), {district}")
  )

active_people <- people |> filter(!people_id %in% former_ids)
```

## Overview

The 91st Iowa General Assembly currently has **`r nrow(active_people)`** legislators serving in the House and Senate.

```{r}
# Party breakdown by chamber (active legislators only)
chamber_party <- active_people |>
  count(role, party) |>
  pivot_wider(names_from = party, values_from = n, values_fill = 0) |>
  mutate(
    Chamber = case_when(
      role == "Rep" ~ "House",
      role == "Sen" ~ "Senate"
    )
  ) |>
  select(Chamber, R, D) |>
  mutate(Total = R + D)

gt(chamber_party) |>
  cols_label(
    R = "Republican",
    D = "Democrat"
  ) |>
  tab_header(title = "Party Composition by Chamber")
```

```{r}
#| output: asis
if (nrow(former_info) > 0) {
  cat("**Note:** The following legislators are no longer serving and have been replaced this session:\n\n")
  for (i in seq_len(nrow(former_info))) {
    cat(str_glue("- {former_info$note[i]}"), "\n")
  }
}
```

---

## Senate

```{r}
# Calculate activity stats for each legislator
sponsor_counts <- sponsors |>
  count(people_id, name = "bills_sponsored")

# Count bills where legislator is the only sponsor
sole_sponsor_counts <- sponsors |>
  group_by(bill_id) |>
  filter(n() == 1, position == 1) |>
  ungroup() |>
  count(people_id, name = "sole_sponsored")

# Count only floor votes (exclude committee report votes)
floor_rollcalls <- rollcalls |>
  filter(!str_detect(description, "Report$")) |>
  pull(roll_call_id)

vote_counts <- votes |>
  filter(roll_call_id %in% floor_rollcalls) |>
  count(people_id, name = "votes_cast")

senators <- people |>
  filter(role == "Sen") |>
  left_join(sponsor_counts, by = "people_id") |>
  left_join(sole_sponsor_counts, by = "people_id") |>
  left_join(vote_counts, by = "people_id") |>
  left_join(
    legislator_stats |> select(people_id, with_party_pct, participation_rate),
    by = "people_id"
  ) |>
  replace_na(list(bills_sponsored = 0, sole_sponsored = 0, votes_cast = 0)) |>
  rowwise() |>
  mutate(
    filename = get_legislator_filename(people_id, people),
    name_link = str_glue("<a href='{filename}.html'>{name}</a>")
  ) |>
  ungroup() |>
  arrange(district) |>
  select(name_link, party, district, bills_sponsored, sole_sponsored, votes_cast, with_party_pct, participation_rate)

gt(senators) |>
  cols_label(
    name_link = "Name",
    party = "Party",
    district = "District",
    bills_sponsored = "Bills Sponsored",
    sole_sponsored = "Sole Sponsor",
    votes_cast = "Floor Votes",
    with_party_pct = "Party Alignment",
    participation_rate = "Participation"
  ) |>
  fmt_markdown(columns = name_link) |>
  fmt_percent(columns = c(with_party_pct, participation_rate), decimals = 1) |>
  tab_options(
    table.font.size = px(12),
    data_row.padding = px(4)
  )
```

---

## House of Representatives

```{r}
representatives <- people |>
  filter(role == "Rep") |>
  left_join(sponsor_counts, by = "people_id") |>
  left_join(sole_sponsor_counts, by = "people_id") |>
  left_join(vote_counts, by = "people_id") |>
  left_join(
    legislator_stats |> select(people_id, with_party_pct, participation_rate),
    by = "people_id"
  ) |>
  replace_na(list(bills_sponsored = 0, sole_sponsored = 0, votes_cast = 0)) |>
  rowwise() |>
  mutate(
    filename = get_legislator_filename(people_id, people),
    name_link = str_glue("<a href='{filename}.html'>{name}</a>")
  ) |>
  ungroup() |>
  arrange(district) |>
  select(name_link, party, district, bills_sponsored, sole_sponsored, votes_cast, with_party_pct, participation_rate)

gt(representatives) |>
  cols_label(
    name_link = "Name",
    party = "Party",
    district = "District",
    bills_sponsored = "Bills Sponsored",
    sole_sponsored = "Sole Sponsor",
    votes_cast = "Floor Votes",
    with_party_pct = "Party Alignment",
    participation_rate = "Participation"
  ) |>
  fmt_markdown(columns = name_link) |>
  fmt_percent(columns = c(with_party_pct, participation_rate), decimals = 1) |>
  tab_options(
    table.font.size = px(12),
    data_row.padding = px(4)
  )
```

---

## Find by District

Use the table below to search for legislators by district number.

```{r}
all_legislators <- people |>
  left_join(sponsor_counts, by = "people_id") |>
  left_join(sole_sponsor_counts, by = "people_id") |>
  left_join(vote_counts, by = "people_id") |>
  left_join(
    legislator_stats |> select(people_id, with_party_pct, participation_rate),
    by = "people_id"
  ) |>
  replace_na(list(bills_sponsored = 0, sole_sponsored = 0, votes_cast = 0)) |>
  rowwise() |>
  mutate(
    filename = get_legislator_filename(people_id, people),
    name_link = str_glue("<a href='{filename}.html'>{name}</a>"),
    chamber = if_else(role == "Sen", "Senate", "House")
  ) |>
  ungroup() |>
  arrange(chamber, district) |>
  select(chamber, district, name_link, party, bills_sponsored, sole_sponsored, votes_cast, with_party_pct, participation_rate)

gt(all_legislators) |>
  cols_label(
    chamber = "Chamber",
    district = "District",
    name_link = "Name",
    party = "Party",
    bills_sponsored = "Bills Sponsored",
    sole_sponsored = "Sole Sponsor",
    votes_cast = "Floor Votes",
    with_party_pct = "Party Alignment",
    participation_rate = "Participation"
  ) |>
  fmt_markdown(columns = name_link) |>
  fmt_percent(columns = c(with_party_pct, participation_rate), decimals = 1) |>
  tab_options(
    table.font.size = px(12),
    data_row.padding = px(4)
  ) |>
  opt_interactive(
    use_search = TRUE,
    use_filters = TRUE,
    use_page_size_select = TRUE,
    page_size_default = 25
  )
```

---

[Back to Home](../index.html)

*Last updated: `r Sys.Date()`*
